case_title: LUIS E GONZALEZ VS. SPEC DRILLING & SHORING, INC.

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: MARGAIN, TOMAS E. SUBSTITUTED FOR LABOR COMMISSIONER, STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS ATTORNEY FOR GONZALEZ, LUIS E

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, LUIS E AS TO DEFENDANT SPEC DRILLING & SHORING, INC. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
